nodes.context: One-percenter motorcycle club founded in San Bernardino, California in 1956, active in Australia, Germany, Norway, Brazil, and the United States.
Motorcycle club whose former members founded Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club Australia in 1969.
South Australian formed motorcycle club that amalgamated with Gypsy Joker MC.
Gang in Adelaide, South Australia; a Gypsy Joker member shot and wounded a member of this gang.
Outlaw motorcycle club; a former Hells Angel was shot by a Gypsy Joker member.
Local Norwegian motorcycle club that patched over to become Gypsy Joker MC Norway.
Support club for Gypsy Joker MC Norway in Brazil, established in 2017.

edges.evidence_quote: In November 1969, Gypsy Joker Motorcycle Club Australia was founded by former members of the St Mary's Motorcycle Club
edges.context: Gypsy Joker MC Australia was founded by former members of St Mary's Motorcycle Club.

edges.evidence_quote: Following a friendly amalgamation with the notorious South Australian formed Mandamas MC and Gypsy Joker MC.
edges.context: Gypsy Joker MC amalgamated with Mandamas MC.

edges.evidence_quote: He shot and wounded a member of the Newboys gang and former Hells Angel outside their clubhouse in Adelaide, South Australia.
edges.context: A Gypsy Joker member shot a member of the Newboys gang.

edges.evidence_quote: He shot and wounded a member of the Newboys gang and former Hells Angel outside their clubhouse in Adelaide, South Australia.
edges.context: A Gypsy Joker member shot a former Hells Angel.

edges.evidence_quote: Just days after a big sign with Gypsy Joker MC decorated the former Joker MC clubhouse.
edges.context: Joker MC patched over to become Gypsy Joker MC Norway.

edges.evidence_quote: Gypsy Joker MC Norway have a support club in Brazil, Jesters MC, established in 2017.
edges.context: Jesters MC is a support club for Gypsy Joker MC Norway.
